task_updates.executor_notes: Wrote H1 + 5-line preamble naming oncall, after-Phase-1-gate timing, covers/doesn't list pointing at redesign for Phase 1 design. §1 banner enumerates SIX TODO(phase-1) items: (a) toggle name + location with <LIVE_EDITOR_PUBLISH_TOGGLE>, (b) Branch A vs Branch B suppression mechanism, (c) Branch-B run-row suppression marker column/metadata key, (d) new-editor + legacy bot identities in live channel, (e) prod trace-embed channel, (f) run-source discriminator on live_update_editor_runs with explicit note that storage_handler.py:652-682 confirms no run_source/editor_source/run_type column today. Out-of-scope clause: any third mechanism (hybrid, per-guild, per-channel, partial-guild) OR omission of TODO(f) → ABORT to consult-the-doc (§11). Primary tools bullet list covers <LIVE_EDITOR_PUBLISH_TOGGLE>, trace channel, SQL one-liners, legacy editor entrypoint at live_update_editor.py:60, legacy publish wiring _publish_accepted_candidates :84-107 + _select_publishable_candidates :261, migration hand-off chain. Guardrails: rename only after watch, cross-window trip-wire citing :600-601, both editors keep writing own tables citing :651, default ABORT. §2 Fast Triage SQL groups by publication_status scoped environment='prod' last-hour, includes -- swap to 'dev' for pre-flip verification comment with 'no partials in dev during Phase 1 per :611/:627/:633 — 0 dev partials does NOT mean prod is clean' annotation. 'Then classify' bullet list per status with jump-to pointers to §6/§7. State-summary one-liner against topics. Recent-runs one-liner against live_update_editor_runs noting Branch-B marker (TODO c) AND run-source discriminator (TODO f) appear on those rows.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed: §1 provisional banner enumerates SIX TODO(phase-1) items labeled (a) through (f), with (f) being the run-source discriminator on live_update_editor_runs (citing src/common/storage_handler.py:652-682 to confirm no such column today). Explicit out-of-scope clause covers any third mechanism (hybrid, per-guild config, per-channel rollout, partial-guild canary) OR omission of TODO(f) → ABORT to §11. §2 Fast Triage SQL groups by publication_status scoped environment='prod' over last hour, with `-- swap to 'dev' for pre-flip verification` comment AND the 'no partials in dev during Phase 1 per :611/:627/:633' annotation that also warns operators not to misread '0 dev partials' as 'prod clean'.
